AddElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
AddElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
AddElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.isIpv6: Whether to assign an IPv6 address. Set to true to allocate an IPv6 address; defaults to false for IPv4.
AddElasticNetworkCardAuxiliaryIp.privateIpAddress: The private IP address to be added
